title: TikTok Hashtag Posts Scraper
description: Extract public TikTok posts by hashtag, hashtag URL, or numeric challenge ID.

hashtag.title: TikTok Hashtag
hashtag.description: TikTok hashtag with or without #, full HTTPS TikTok hashtag URL, or numeric challenge ID. Bare numeric values are treated as challenge IDs.

region.title: Region
region.description: Optional country or region code, such as US.

count.title: Posts Per Page
count.description: Number of posts to return from this page. Scrappa accepts 1-50.

cursor.title: Cursor
cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous run. Leave empty for the first page. API callers may also pass numeric cursors.
